No Upgrade Selected.description: TAP AN UPGRADE ABOVE! Also, as a reward for reading this, I'll let you know that upgrading this 'nothing' bonus actually boosts breeding exp gain 1% per LV lmao

Gene Splicing } Helps unlock next Mob ty.upgradeName: Gene Splicing } Helps unlock next Mob type
Gene Splicing } Helps unlock next Mob ty.description: Unlocks Gene Boosting, which increases chance to breed new Mobs. Use the DNA Splicer tool from the Town Shop to get Genes.

Egg Capacity.description: Increases the maximum number of eggs your incubator can hold. The more eggs you currently hold, the rarer it is to get a new one.

Breedability Mobs.description: Unlocks Breedability, which increases chance to breed new Mobs. Put a 'pink' Mobs in the Fenceyard to increase their multiplier.

Fence Extension.description: Increases the number of slots in your Fence Yard, allowing for more Mobs to roam around, free range style!

Rarity of the Egg.description: Unlocks the 3rd Multi, Egg Rarity. When the egg incubator is full, theres a chance to increase the rarity of another egg!

Blooming Axe.description: All Mobs do more damage in battle!

Pastpresent Brood.description: Unlocks the 4th Breeding Multi, Pastpres. This increases based on the number of different Mobs discovered from the previous world.

Paint Bucket.description: Unlocks Shiny Mob Breeding. Shiny Mobs come in 1 of 5 colours, and boost their Special Passive bonus when in the Fenceyard.

Overwhelmed Golden Egg.description: Your New Mob Chance is multiplied for every 100 kitchen upgrade levels across all kitchens! So 200 Lvs would apply it twice!!

Failsafe Restitution Cloud.description: Unlocks the 5th Breeding Multiplier, Failure. This increases every time you fail to get a new/shiny Mob, up to a max, and depletes when you succeed.

Shattershell Iteration.description: Every time you use up your last incubator egg, there is a chance to produce 2 more eggs immediately.

Grand Martial of Shinytown.description: Boosts the rate at which Shiny Mobs level up from being in the fenceyard. This will help you rack up those 100+ Day requirements!
